note: Latest-stable reference versions used to flag an OUTDATED bundled runtime (Electron / Chromium / Node) in a thick-client app. TCPK cannot enumerate the exact CVEs offline, so the offline finding states a version-age fact against this asOf date; run with -OnlineCve to pull the specific advisories from OSV (electron@<version>, npm ecosystem). Update these values periodically; the finding always prints the asOf date so its reference point is explicit.
